title: AppState, AppEvent, AppCommand types
description:
Create crates/jmap-chat-egui/src/app.rs and src/event.rs defining shared state and channel message types.

What: Define all mutable GUI state and channel message enums.

Algorithm:
1. In event.rs, define:
   AppEvent (task→UI):
   - SessionReady { api_url: String, account_id: String }
   - ChatsLoaded(Vec<Chat>)
   - MessagesLoaded { chat_id: String, messages: Vec<Message> }
   - StatusChanged(ConnectionStatus)
   - Error(String)

   AppCommand (UI→task):
   - SelectChat(String)  // Chat.id
   - SendMessage { chat_id: String, body: String }
   - MarkRead { chat_id: String, message_id: String }

   ConnectionStatus enum: Connecting, Connected, Reconnecting, Error(String), Disconnected.

2. In app.rs, define AppState:
   - chats: Vec<Chat>
   - selected_chat: Option<String>
   - messages: Vec<Message>          // messages for selected chat
   - compose_text: String
   - status: ConnectionStatus
   - error: Option<String>           // transient, shown for a few seconds
   - api_url: String                 // learned from session
   - account_id: String              // learned from session

3. Impl AppState::apply_event(event: AppEvent) to mutate self (no network, pure state transition).

Defensive rules:
- All enums #[non_exhaustive] if they mirror external data.
- No unwrap in apply_event.
- error field set to None after 5 seconds (timer tracked in AppState with Instant).

Tests (in tests/app_state_test.rs):
- apply_chats_loaded: AppState::default() + ChatsLoaded(vec![chat1]) → chats == [chat1]
- apply_status_changed: apply StatusChanged(Connected) → status == Connected
- apply_error: apply Error('oops') → error == Some('oops')
- apply_messages_loaded: apply MessagesLoaded{chat_id, messages} → messages populated
- apply_select_chat_clears_messages: send SelectChat → messages cleared pending reload
Oracle: expected state derived directly from event content, not via implementation.
acceptance_criteria: cargo test -p jmap-chat-egui app_state exits 0; all 5 AppState tests pass
close_reason: app.rs + event.rs + 6 tests passing, clippy clean
